strategy: Stack plenty of blades and traps before hitting. He resists every school 50%, so a single unbuffed hit does little.
Bring Doom and Gloom and Infection. He has a 100% outgoing healing boost and heals himself hard, so cut his heals.
Discard the Crippling Fear cards he jams into your hand so they do not clog your draws.
Feint and blade-stack onto one hitter, apply infection, then hit hard through the 50% resist.
At 15,920 Health with heavy self-healing and blanket resist, run it as a team: a hitter, supports blading and Feinting, and someone maintaining infection.
cheatNotes: On Round 1 he shadow-casts four Crippling Fear cards into every wizard's hand, so discard them to keep your draws clean.
He casts another shadow spell later to hand out even more Crippling Fear, so keep discarding.
